title: Anthony Campos
compiled_truth: Anthony Campos is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-02), Anthony Campos sent 15 and received 649 emails, totalling 664 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (12), [Stacey Richardson](people/stacey-richardson) (5), [Linda Bryan](people/linda-bryan) (5), [Bridgette Anderson](people/bridgette-anderson) (4), [Georgi Landau](people/georgi-landau) (3).
